use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR TREATING THYROID CARCINOMA INCLUDING DIFFERENTIATED THYROID CANCER
TREATMENT WITH LENVIMA BY ADMINISTERING LENVIMA AS A SUSPENSION
FIRST-LINE TREATMENT OF ADULTS PATIENTS WITH ADVANCED RENAL CELL CARCINOMA BY ADMINISTERING LENVIMA IN COMBINATION WITH PEMBROLIZUMAB

TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH PMMR/NOT MSI-H ADVANCED ENDOMETRIAL CARCINOMA, HAVE DISEASE PROGRESSION FOLLOWING PRIOR SYSTEMIC THERAPY, AND ARE NOT CANDIDATES FOR CURATIVE SURGERY OR RADIATION, BY ADMINISTERING LENVIMA IN COMBINATION WITH PEMBROLIZUMAB

indications.text:
1.1 Differentiated Thyroid Cancer
LENVIMA is indicated for the treatment of patients with locally recurrent or metastatic,
progressive, radioactive iodine-refractory differentiated thyroid cancer (DTC).
